message.content: @startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center actor "" as User1 participant ":Chantier" as Chantier participant "jmb:Artisan" as ArtisanJMB participant "q:Qualif" as QualifQ participant "real : Realiser" as RealiseReal User1 ->> Chantier: getPayeArtisan(jmb) activate Chantier Chantier->>ArtisanJMB: q = getQualif() activate ArtisanJMB return tauxH=getTauxH() deactivate ArtisanJMB loop ForEach real alt [a == jmb] note right of Chantier #white;line:green;text:red\na\n==\njmb: d=duree(real)\ndurée +=d; end end return durée*tauxH deactivate Chantier @enduml
